inputs.label: EU Shoe Size
inputs.businessContext: Shoe size according to the European standard (Paris points).

inputs.label: Conversion Type (1: Men, 2: Women, 3: Kids)
inputs.businessContext: Select the target gender/age group for US size conversion: 1 for men, 2 for women, 3 for children.

inputs.label: Brand Adjustment
inputs.businessContext: Offset to account for brand-specific sizing variations (e.g., +0.5 if the brand runs small).

inputs.label: Calibration Offset
inputs.businessContext: User-defined calibration offset for personal fit preferences.

formulas.usSize: conversionType == 1 ? menUS + brandAdjustment + calibrationOffset : conversionType == 2 ? womenUS + brandAdjustment + calibrationOffset : kidsUS + brandAdjustment + calibrationOffset
